title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A YouTube video demonstrates building an event management system with role-based access control using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The video covers database structure generation, workflow automations, and comparisons with similar no-code platforms like Lovable and Replit. Softr appears designed to reduce AI token consumption during application development by minimizing the need for multiple prompts.
